projects.title: CSKampas gaming servers
projects.summary: Hosting and administering Counter-Strike servers during school years. First taste of running production systems.

projects.title: Kiberzona — Minecraft community admin
projects.summary: One of the administrators of Lithuania's biggest gaming community at the time, running and maintaining its Minecraft server ecosystem.

projects.title: Už saugią Lietuvą
projects.summary: Interactive survey system for the nationwide "Už saugią Lietuvą" campaign. Received a gratitude letter from President Dalia Grybauskaitė.

projects.title: Mentorship Portal
projects.summary: Team project: a portal for finding mentors and mentees. React, Redux, Saga, Nx, Material-UI, Storybook.

projects.title: Gatsby Portfolio
projects.summary: Earlier iteration of the portfolio built with Gatsby and Contentful CMS.

projects.title: Restaurants in Warsaw
projects.summary: Mobile app for finding restaurants via the Yelp API. Published to Google Play.

projects.title: Restaurant Demo
projects.summary: Template restaurant website with a Strapi CMS backend, containerised with Docker.

projects.title: Discord Bot for Dota 2
projects.summary: Tracks Dota 2 matches and posts score notifications to Discord via the Steam API.

projects.title: Lithuanian Wordle
projects.summary: A Lithuanian word-guessing game inspired by Wordle.

projects.title: Ardauzta / Autopatikra
projects.summary: AI-powered car condition analysis for Lithuanian listings — analyses photos for paint, body, rust, accidents, glass and interior. SaaS with Stripe billing.

projects.title: ScanKaunas
projects.summary: City exploration game for Kaunas — scan QR codes for facts, audio and secrets. Achievements, leaderboard, admin panel, LT/EN.
